channel.title: islammdshariful
channel.description: I write about Playwright, automation, and AI-driven QA workflows.

item.title: How to Build a Personal Blog Site with Astro and Deploy to GitHub Pages
item.description: Learn how to build a fast, modern personal blog with Astro featuring dark mode, Pagefind search, SEO optimization, and automatic GitHub Pages deployment.

item.title: How I Built a Self-Updating Knowledge Base That Keeps My AI QA Agent Always in Sync With the Codebase
item.description: Learn how to build a self-updating knowledge base that extracts live data from your codebase and keeps your AI QA agent's reference docs always in sync.

item.title: How I Built an AI-Powered QA Agent That Generates Test Plans From Pull Requests Using Claude Code
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building an AI-powered QA agent that reads PR diffs and generates comprehensive white-box test plans using Claude Code and Playwright.

item.title: How I Built a Multi-Site Docker Testing Environment for WordPress Plugin Testing
item.description: How to build a Docker-based multi-site testing environment for WordPress plugin testing with Playwright integration and isolated configurations.
